_note: 239 (was 238): +1 for the Quick Capture page /capture (docs/34) — inherently client-first (camera capture via <input capture>, FileReader→data URL, react-query mutation + live 'my captures' list); a server shell + island split cannot remove the client island. 241 (was 239): +2 for the i18n client-islands localizing the pipeline & financial-health RSC dashboards (PR #410) — both required to run the client-only t() hook on a server-prefetched page. 242 (was 241): +1 for the god Platform Console island (/platform, platform-client.tsx) — an inherently interactive admin surface (company table with row actions, provision/invite dialogs, approve/reject mutations); it already uses the RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx prefetches), so the island is the irreducible client boundary. 243 (was 242): +1 for the shop/basket requisition page /shop — inherently client-first like /capture (local basket state + qty steppers, per-line urgent toggle, free-text off-catalog request, plus the react-query catalog fetch + checkout mutation); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. Justified exceptions to the down-only ratchet; keep converting other pages to RSC to bring this back down.
